peculiarities:
ஔ is a gliding sound: 'ow' as in 'cow'. It starts open like அ and rounds off like உ, two sounds in one breath. It is the last of the twelve vowels and the rarest; you will mostly meet it in a few special words.

The shape is grand: a curl, a stem, and a tall companion stroke beside it. It is a long journey for our snake, so you get extra time to trace it.
